pending_events.description: I have reached the hiding spot

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey James, Mia, why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Ethan Brown

actions.dialog_text: Hey James, have you heard about the new CRISPR advancements? They could revolutionize gene therapy.
actions.plan: I am in the cafeteria and see some familiar faces. It might be a good opportunity to discuss some recent scientific discoveries or ask about upcoming competitions.
I just heard a gunshot, which means the shooter might be nearby. I need to find a hiding spot quickly to stay safe.
The shooter is at the entrance hall, quite a distance from me. Staying hidden here is the safest option for now. I should remain quiet and still.

The shooter is still at the entrance hall, and I am currently safe in this hiding spot. Moving now could be risky, so I will stay hidden and quiet. I notice Ethan trying to lighten the mood with a joke, but now is not the time for distractions.

memories.description: I greeted James Rodriguez and brought up the topic of CRISPR gene editing to engage in a scientific discussion.
I heard a loud gunshot indicating an active shooter nearby, so I decided to sprint to the closest hiding spot 9 for safety.
I am currently hiding in the cafeteria, aware that the shooter is at the entrance hall 24.43 meters away. I decided to stay still and silent to avoid detection.
I remain hidden and silent in the cafeteria, aware that the shooter is still at the entrance hall. I noticed Ethan Brown making a joke but chose to stay focused on safety.
